pit_brackets_2024.notes: 12%/32% brackets with 30,000 PLN tax-free amount — Polski Ład since 2022. Bracket threshold 120,000 PLN. Tax reduction 3,600 PLN (= 30,000 × 12%).

pit_brackets_2025.notes: Same bracket structure as 2024. No legislation announced changing the 12%/32% rates or 120,000 PLN threshold for 2025.

pit_brackets_2026.notes: Projected same structure as 2024–2025. 2026 PIT law not yet published. Mark Debatable in tax_calculator confidence.

zus_rates_2024.notes: Employee: emerytalne 9.76% + rentowe 1.5% + chorobowe 2.45% = 13.71% total. Employer: emerytalne 9.76% + rentowe 6.5% + wypadkowe ~1.67% + Fundusz Pracy 2.45% + FGŚP 0.1% ≈ 20.48%.

zus_cap_2024.notes: Annual ZUS cap (roczna podstawa wymiaru składek) for pension and disability = 30× average monthly salary. 2024 cap: ~234,720 PLN.

health_insurance_2024.notes: Składka zdrowotna: 9% of (gross − employee ZUS). NOT deductible from PIT since Polski Ład effective 1 January 2022. Before 2022: 7.75% was deductible, 1.25% was not.

ulga_dla_mlodych.notes: PIT exemption for employees under 26 years old with income up to 85,528 PLN per year. Applies to employment contracts (umowa o pracę) and specified civil-law contracts.

ulga_na_dzieci.notes: 1,112.04 PLN per child (1st and 2nd), 2,000.04 PLN (3rd child), 2,700.00 PLN (4th and subsequent). Refundable if tax is insufficient. Unchanged since 2013.

ikze_limit_2024.notes: IKZE deduction cap indexed annually to 1.2× average monthly salary. 9,388 PLN for 2024. 2025 estimate ~9,700 PLN, 2026 estimate ~10,080 PLN — based on published salary growth trends.

ikze_limit_2025.notes: Estimated 9,700 PLN for 2025 based on 1.2× projected average monthly salary. Confirm when KNF publishes the official limit.

ikze_limit_2026.notes: Estimated 10,080 PLN for 2026 based on continued indexation. Confirm when KNF publishes the official limit.

koszty_uzyskania_przychodu.notes: Standard (podstawowe): 3,000 PLN/year for one employer. Elevated (podwyższone): 3,600 PLN/year if employee commutes from a different city. Unchanged since 2020.

pracownicze_koszty_2024_2026.notes: Art. 22 ust. 2 ustawy o PIT. Basic 3,000 PLN (250 PLN/month), elevated 3,600 PLN (300 PLN/month). No announced changes for 2025–2026.

ulga_internetowa.notes: Deductible up to 760 PLN/year for documented internet costs. Eligible only in 2 consecutive tax years — cannot be claimed for a third year in a row.

darowizny.notes: Donations to OPP (public-benefit organisations) and other eligible recipients deductible up to 6% of income. Keep bank transfer confirmations.

ulga_na_powrot.notes: 4-year PIT exemption for persons returning to Poland after at least 3 years of tax residence abroad. Income exempt up to 85,528 PLN/year. Requires formal transfer-of-tax-residence documentation.

wspolne_rozliczenie.notes: Joint filing splits combined income and taxes each half at the progressive rates. Applicable to married couples (not separated). Filed on PIT-36 or PIT-37 with the 'wspólne rozliczenie' box ticked.

twoj_e_pit.notes: Pre-filled PIT available from 15 February. If not rejected or modified by 30 April, it is automatically accepted. Based on data from employers (PIT-11) and ZUS.
